name: BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho Rum
title: BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho Rum | Bacardi 8 Year Old Rum | Bacardi 8 Anos | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: After a minimum of eight years of waiting, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices.
marketing_description: Inspired by a family recipe from 1862, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho is known as The Family Reserve. After a minimum of eight years of ageing, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices. Enjoy this golden sipping rum and discover a private rum for all to enjoy.
tasting_notes: BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho is a complex golden rum with a deep, layered and mellow flavor of dried fruits, spices and oaky vanilla.
process: After a minimum of eight years of ageing, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices.

faq_items.question: What is aged rum?
faq_items.answer: Rum can be aged anywhere from one year upwards. Aging rum can add additional complexity to its flavor and mouthfeel.

faq_items.question: What is the difference between dark, gold and white rum?
faq_items.answer: Color can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavors that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But color can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself.

faq_items.question: How do you make rum?
faq_items.answer: Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended.

raw_text_excerpt: BACARDÍ RESERVA OCHO Inspired by a family recipe from 1862, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho is known as The Family Reserve. Tasting Notes BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho is a complex golden rum with a deep, layered and mellow flavor of dried fruits, spices and oaky vanilla. Nose Dried apricot and banana leaf Palate Oak and spices Finish Expansive and well-rounded After a minimum of eight years of ageing, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices.
